utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package contains: destination (Portugal), travel_dates (September 25-30, 2024), transportation (has departure city, flight_cost, reservation_number but lacks full flight details like airline/flight times; however, the format only mandates 'flight details with costs'—cost is present, details arguably minimal but present), accommodation (location, nights, total_cost, booking_reference—meets 'hotel selection with costs'), activities (three activities with costs—meets), additional_services (absent), total_budget (has total_cost and remaining_budget—meets). Count fully specified: destination (yes, 1), travel_dates (yes, 2), transportation (has cost and some details; considered sufficient per format, 3), accommodation (yes, 4), activities (yes, 5), additional_services (missing, 0), total_budget (yes, 6). Therefore 6/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We map each element of the final package to the closest matching item in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: Portugal corresponds to Lisbon, Portugal in the destinations list. Transportation: budget airline economy class matches Budget Airlines -> Economy Class. Accommodation: 'Backpackers Base Hostel' aligns with 'Backpacker's Base'. Activities: Vegan Cooking Class is an exact match. The other two activities (Porto Photography Workshop, Douro Valley Hiking Tour) do not have exact entries; the closest general matches are 'Night Photography Tour' (night activity) and 'Hiking Expedition' (activities). Since we must map only to items present in the ground-truth list, we map Vegan Cooking Class directly and Douro Valley Hiking Tour to Hiking Expedition. There is no exact ground-truth item for Porto Photography Workshop under activities; photography-related in activities list is absent, so we omit it as there's no exact item to map. We include only items that have a clear counterpart.
